components.name: DFDialog
components.description: Form dialog component built on final-form that renders fields in a modal dialog with validation, tabs, sections, and submit handling

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name for the dialog

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls dialog visibility

props.name: fields
props.description: Array of field descriptors or tabbed field descriptors defining the form structure

props.name: onAdd
props.type: (form: FormApi<FormValues, InitialFormValues>) => Promise<{validationErrors?: ValidationErrors & {[FORM_ERROR]?: any}} | undefined | void>
props.description: Submit handler called when the form is submitted

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the dialog is closed

props.name: validate
props.description: Form-level validation function

props.name: onActiveTabChange
props.description: Called when the active tab changes

props.name: size
props.description: Dialog size

props.name: initialValues
props.description: Initial form values; if not provided, default field initial values are used

props.name: modal
props.description: Whether the dialog is modal

props.name: pristineSubmittable
props.description: Whether the form can be submitted without changes

props.name: isApplyDisabled
props.description: Custom function to determine if the apply button should be disabled

props.name: headerProps
props.type: { title?: React.ReactNode; insertAfter?: React.ReactNode; insertBefore?: React.ReactNode }
props.description: Properties for the dialog header

props.name: footerProps
props.type: { hidden?: boolean; textApply?: React.ReactNode; textCancel?: string; content?: React.ReactNode; propsButtonCancel?: DialogFooterProps['propsButtonCancel']; propsButtonApply?: DialogFooterProps['propsButtonApply'] }
props.description: Properties for the dialog footer

props.name: waitingMessage
props.description: Message displayed while the form is submitting

props.name: virtualized
props.description: Whether to use virtualized rendering for large forms

props.name: formId
props.description: Custom form element ID

props.name: formExtras
props.description: Additional properties passed to react-final-form Form component

props.name: disableFormReset
props.description: Disables form reset on dialog close

components.name: CheckBoxControl
components.description: Checkbox form control wrapping the Gravity UI Checkbox component for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Current checked state

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the new boolean value

props.name: children
props.description: Checkbox label content

components.name: TextControl
components.description: Text input form control wrapping the Gravity UI TextInput for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Current input value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the new string value

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display

components.name: TextAreaControl
components.description: Textarea form control wrapping the Gravity UI TextArea for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Current textarea value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the new string value

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display

components.name: SelectControl
components.description: Select form control wrapping the Gravity UI Select for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected values

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the selected values

components.name: RadioButtonControl
components.description: Radio button group form control wrapping the Gravity UI SegmentedRadioGroup for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the selected value

props.name: options
props.description: Array of radio options with value and label

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the radio group

components.name: TumblerControl
components.description: Toggle switch form control wrapping the Gravity UI Switch for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Current toggle state

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the new boolean value

props.name: labelLeft
props.description: Label displayed to the left of the switch

props.name: labelRight
props.description: Label displayed to the right of the switch

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the switch

components.name: PlainText
components.description: Read-only plain text display control for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Text value to display

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler (required by control interface but not actively used)

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder content shown when value is empty

components.name: CustomBlock
components.description: Custom block control that renders arbitrary children within a DFDialog form field

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content to render in the form field

components.name: EditableList
components.description: Editable list control that displays items with remove/restore actions for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: itemClassName
props.description: CSS class name for individual list items

props.name: value
props.description: Array of list items

props.name: maxVisibleCount
props.description: Maximum number of items visible before 'show all' toggle

props.name: itemRenderer
props.description: Custom item renderer function

props.name: frozen
props.description: When true, disables remove/restore actions on all items

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the updated items array

components.name: EditableManyLists
components.description: Multiple editable lists grouped with titles for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: titleClassName
props.description: CSS class name for list group titles

props.name: value
props.description: Array of list groups, each with a title and data items

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the updated list groups

props.name: itemRenderer
props.description: Custom item renderer function for individual list items

props.name: maxVisibleCount
props.description: Maximum visible items per list before 'show all' toggle

components.name: MultiTextControl
components.description: Multi-value text input control that creates label tags from entered text for use in DFDialog forms

props.name: value
props.description: Array of label items

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler called with the updated labels array

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Focus event handler

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Blur event handler

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the control is disabled

components.name: TabField
components.description: Horizontal tab control for organizing DFDialog form fields into tabbed sections

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: activeTab
props.description: ID of the currently active tab

props.name: setActiveTab
props.description: Callback to change the active tab

props.name: onRemoveTab
props.description: Callback when a tab is removed

props.name: onCreateTab
props.type: (fieldName: string, active?: boolean, opts?: {userOptions?: any}) => void
props.description: Callback to create a new tab

props.name: tabItems
props.description: Array of tab item descriptors

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the tabs

components.name: TabFieldVertical
components.description: Vertical tab control using a sortable list for organizing DFDialog form fields into tabbed sections

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: activeTab
props.description: ID of the currently active tab

props.name: setActiveTab
props.description: Callback to change the active tab

props.name: onRemoveTab
props.description: Callback when a tab is removed

props.name: onCreateTab
props.type: (fieldName: string, active?: boolean, opts?: {userOptions?: any}) => void
props.description: Callback to create a new tab

props.name: tabItems
props.description: Array of tab item descriptors

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the tab items

props.name: sortable
props.description: Whether tabs can be reordered by drag

props.name: onOrderChanged
props.description: Callback when tab order changes via drag

props.name: wrapTo
props.description: Custom wrapper function for each tab item

props.name: virtualized
props.description: Whether to use virtualized rendering for large tab lists

components.name: Condition
components.description: Conditional rendering component that shows or hides children based on the value of another form field

props.name: when
props.description: Name of the form field to observe

props.name: isActive
props.description: Predicate that determines whether children are rendered based on the observed field value

props.name: children
props.description: Content to conditionally render

components.name: CollapsibleSection
components.description: Collapsible section wrapper with a caption header and expand/collapse toggle

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: alwaysExpanded
props.description: When true, the section cannot be collapsed

props.name: initialCollapsed
props.description: When true, the section starts in a collapsed state

props.name: caption
props.description: Section header text

props.name: captionClassName
props.description: CSS class name for the caption element

props.name: children
props.description: Section content

components.name: FocusBlurContainer
components.description: Container that tracks composite focus/blur events across child elements, firing blur only when focus leaves the entire container

props.name: children
props.description: Container content

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class name

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Called when focus enters the container

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Called when focus leaves the container entirely

components.name: DeprecatedDialog
components.description: Deprecated class-based Dialog component; use DFDialog instead

hooks.name: useStableEventHandler
hooks.signature: <TFunc extends (...args: unknown[]) => void>(func: TFunc | undefined) => (...args: Parameters<TFunc>) => void

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: The event handler function to stabilize; the returned callback always calls the latest version
